👁️ Vision

To become a global leader in Quality Engineering, Validation, and Life Sciences Technology — driving compliance-driven innovation and AI-enabled quality transformation across regulated Safety and Clinical Platforms, while building scalable career pathways for the next generation of CDM, CSV, and Clinical Systems professionals entering the industry.

Career Journey

2014 — Present · 10 roles
Feb 2024 — Present
Senior Test Lead — Release & Change Management
ArisGlobal Software · Safety Products (LifeSphere MultiVigilance)
Drive hypercare support, regression testing, and OQ/IQ validation for the SaaS Safety System. Customer-facing SME aligning release plans with study timelines; lead training, onboarding, and access management.
  • Coordinate cross-vendor integration testing and data-flow alignment.
  • Primary contact for product-specific change management and validation.
  • Mentor new joiners and conduct biweekly knowledge-sharing on JIRA/Confluence.
  • Maintain training content aligned to compliance and business needs.
May 2024 — Feb 2026
Managed Services Lead (Manager) — Connected Device Project Management
IQVIA RDS · Clinical eSource Platform (ClinSpark EDC/eCRF)
Owned end-to-end product lifecycle for the Clinical IT System — validation documentation (URS/FRS, IQ/OQ/PQ), platform support, customer training bootcamps, and partner integrations.
  • SME for ClinSpark configuration, trial design, and usability.
  • Developed training materials, screencasts, and onboarding guides.
  • Ran weekly customer calls across Sandbox/Validation/Production environments.
  • Coordinated offshore-onshore overlap with US stakeholders.
Nov 2021 — May 2024
Solution Lead — Clinical & Safety IT Systems
ArisGlobal Software · CTMS, eTMF, LSMV, ArisG
Led delivery and release management for platform upgrades and hotfixes; wrote/executed OQ scripts and reviewed IQ documentation as Technical Reviewer; User Access Manager for 20+ clients.
  • Built test plans, scripts, and reports across Sandbox, System, and UAT.
  • Maintained CAPA records and reported product issues to Professional Services.
  • Created LMS training curricula and ran biweekly knowledge transfers.
  • Developed centralized documentation hub for the team.
Jan 2021 — Nov 2021
Operational Excellence Project Specialist
Abbott Healthcare, Mumbai (Talisman HR Solutions)
Managed access across eTMF, CTMS, EDC, IWRS, SharePoint; supported global medical office QC, self-inspections, and training-system administration as super user.
Jun 2020 — Jan 2021
Consultant — eTMF & CTA Submission Coordinator
GlaxoSmithKline · Veeva Vault
eTMF/CTA submission coordination, QA/QC of regulatory documents with ALCOA+ and GDP compliance, TMF RM indexing, and periodic eTMF/KPI reviews.
May 2018 — May 2020
Sr. Associate — Clinical Business Consultant / Business Analyst
Tata Consultancy Services, Thane · Veeva Vault & Oracle CTMS
UAT for CTMS, eTMF, MySites; client configuration specs, training delivery, RCA/CAPA support, and the "Learn to Upskill" knowledge program.
Jul 2017 — Feb 2018
Clinical Document Analyst — eTMF & Clinical Operations
Accenture India Solutions, Bangalore · Veeva Vault
Site activity management, EC dossiers, regulatory submissions, eTMF reconciliation, and clinical study report coordination.
Sep 2015 — Jun 2017
Clinical Process Associate-2 — eTMF Lead
IQVIA · Veeva Vault, ELVIS, WINGSPAN
TMF setup, end-to-end project support, internal audit activities, and study closeout coordination.
Jul 2015 — Aug 2015
Clinical Research Coordinator — Trainee
Hairline International Skin and Hair Clinic, Bangalore
EC meeting coordination, site/trial master file maintenance, and PI support on protocol and ICH-GCP training requirements.
Sep 2014 — Feb 2015
Clinical Research Trainee
Foundation in Clinical Research, ICH-GCP & Clinical Trials
Foundational training across clinical research operations and Good Clinical Practice principles.
